description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a realistic human form, featuring a proportionate torso, limbs, and head. The figure appears to be dressed in typical urban attire, with a fitted upper garment and long pants. The posture is upright, suggesting the person is either standing or walking. The surface is smooth and slightly reflective, indicating a synthetic or plastic material. No accessories or carried items are visible, and the footwear is consistent with everyday walking shoes. The overall silhouette and proportions are consistent with an average adult male.
description: A realistic adult pedestrian figure in upright posture, dressed in fitted urban clothing and walking shoes, with smooth, slightly reflective surfaces.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the figure from a low, upward angle, highlighting the lower body and the underside of the torso.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a side profile, with the outline of the torso and legs visible but details obscured by shadow.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the figure from below, focusing on the feet and lower legs, with the rest of the body receding into the background.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side or rear profile, with the figure mostly in shadow and only the edge of the body visible.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and long pants
